Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Anthony Harris, Esq. for Plaintiff: Parents Helping Parents-San Francisco, Inc.

10:15 a.m. Counsel present, Declaration of Anthony Haris in Support of Default Judgment of Michael Jason Williams and Summary of Plaintiff's Claims presented in open court.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Principal (balance) $147,869.00
Interest $51,175.00
Costs $528.00
Total $199,572.00
Counsel to prepare Judgment.
